task_completion.description: Create the conditions CSV file with the correct columns and data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet or text editor showing a CSV file with headers 'sir', 'ldr', and 'days', containing rows of numerical data corresponding to the 27 Kirby MCQ items.

task_completion.description: Create and save the PsychoPy experiment file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder window open with the title or save dialog indicating the file is named 'delay_discounting.psyexp' and located in '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/'.

task_completion.description: Configure a randomized loop named 'trials' using the CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy loop properties dialog showing the loop name as 'trials', loopType set to 'random', and the conditions file field pointing to 'kirby_mcq.csv' with 27 conditions recognized.

task_completion.description: Add text components for immediate and delayed rewards side-by-side.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy routine showing at least two text components. Their properties or the visual layout should show text containing 'Today: $[sir]' and 'In [days] days: $[ldr]' positioned side-by-side on the screen.

task_completion.description: Add a keyboard response component accepting 'q' and 'p'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: PsychoPy keyboard component properties dialog showing the 'Allowed keys' field containing 'q' and 'p' (e.g., 'q', 'p' or ['q', 'p']).

integrity.description: Agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to create the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the PsychoPy graphical interface (adding routines, loops, and components visually) rather than writing the raw .psyexp XML file in a text editor.
No code components or variables are visible in the PsychoPy routine that attempt to calculate discounting rates or 'k-values'.

integrity.description: Agent created the CSV file within the environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using an editor (like LibreOffice Calc, Gedit, or VS Code) or terminal commands to input the 27 rows of data, rather than magically downloading a completed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file must be located at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/kirby_mcq.csv, contain exactly 27 rows of data, and have the exact column headers 'sir', 'ldr', and 'days'. The PsychoPy experiment must be saved at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/delay_discounting.psyexp.
